title: neea altissima
intro: Neea altissima, also known as the 'Tall Neea' or 'Tall Nee', is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae, native to Central and South America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neea altissima include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Neea altissima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
